Raw base inspectors › File content shape
------------------------------------------
- inspector: file_content_shape
- layer: source
- family: structural
- purpose: Profile selected files by text, tabular, and tree content structure.

Layer context
-------------
Raw base inspectors profile a base directly, before any collection configuration: what files are present, how they parse, and how they are named.

Other raw base inspectors (1)
-----------------------------
- file_tree
